/usr/bin/ar qc libgta2_core.a CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/GameObject.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Weapon.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Gang.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Car.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Ped.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Player.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Game.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/InitWindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/Menu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/PlayerSlotConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/MenuItemConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/gta2/MenuStringSlot.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/gta2/PlayerStats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/MissionObjective.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/DebugProfiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/gta2_core.dir/src/PathNode.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libgta2_core.a
